headline: Will this be the first analog stock to hit $1tn market cap?
summary: Investing.com -- Stifel raised its price target on Texas Instruments to $340 from $290 after meetings with the company’s investor relations team pointed to a broadening industrial recovery and a fast-growing data center business that the broker believes could carry the chipmaker to a trillion-dollar valuation.

content.title: Will this be the first analog stock to hit $1tn market cap?
